svg.text: Data aggregation facade: caching + fallback chains

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the L1 in-memory LRU cache work?')
sendPrompt('How does Redis L2 cache work with TTL-based expiry?')

g.text: Routes by data type to correct adapter
Track failures per source, auto-skip broken APIs
Write to L1 + L2 cache with TTL, return to caller
